word: H7436 - רָמָתַיִם צֹופִים - Râmâthayim Tsôwphîym - raw-maw-thah'-yim tso-feem' - Ramathaimzophim

sections.paragraph:
רמתים צופים - râmâthayim tsôphı̂ym - raw-maw-thah'-yim tso-feem'

From the dual of H7413 and the plural of the active participle of H6822; double height of watchers; Ramathajim Tsophim, a place in Palestine: - Ramathaim-zophim.
